testcase.name: testCreateUserWhenUserDoesNotExist

failed; nested exception is org.springframework.jdbc.datasource.init.ScriptStatementFailedException: Failed to execute SQL script statement #2 of class path resource [schema.sql]: CREATE TABLE IF NOT
